message:
refactor(phase3a): add kc-agent helm handlers (rollback/uninstall/upgrade) (#8033)

Adds the kc-agent side of the helm migration. New handlers shell
`helm rollback`, `helm uninstall`, and `helm upgrade` under the user's
kubeconfig (the one kc-agent loads from ~/.kube/config at startup)
instead of running under the backend pod ServiceAccount.

New file pkg/agent/server_helm.go:
- handleHelmRollback (POST /helm/rollback)
- handleHelmUninstall (POST /helm/uninstall)
- handleHelmUpgrade (POST /helm/upgrade)

Each handler:
- Mirrors the backend HelmRollbackRequest / HelmUninstallRequest /
  HelmUpgradeRequest body shapes verbatim so the frontend will be able
  to swap URLs in Phase 4 with no other changes.
- Re-implements the backend's argument validators (validateK8sName,
  validateHelmChart, validateHelmVersion) because pkg/agent must not
  import pkg/api/handlers. Constants are kept in lockstep until the
  backend handlers are deleted in Phase 4.
- Uses a detached context with the same 10-minute helmOperationTimeout
  the backend uses (#6592), so a disconnected client doesn't SIGKILL
  helm mid-operation and leave releases in pending state.
- For helm upgrade, replicates the temp-values-file flow including the
  #7747 fix that reassigns stdout/stderr on the rebuilt command after
  appending `-f`.

Routes registered in pkg/agent/server.go:
- /helm/rollback, /helm/uninstall, /helm/upgrade

This PR adds the agent side only. The backend handlers in
pkg/api/handlers/gitops.go remain in place until Phase 4 deletes them
along with the frontend URL swap.

Refs #7993

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -410,6 +410,14 @@ func (s *Server) Start() error {
 	// available for future MCS-export UI work.
 	mux.HandleFunc("/serviceexports", s.handleServiceExportsHTTP)
 
+	// Helm mutating operations moved to kc-agent (#7993 Phase 3a). These shell
+	// `helm rollback` / `helm uninstall` / `helm upgrade` under the user's
+	// kubeconfig instead of the backend pod SA. Backend handlers are still
+	// present until Phase 4 deletes them — routes in pkg/agent/server_helm.go.
+	mux.HandleFunc("/helm/rollback", s.handleHelmRollback)
+	mux.HandleFunc("/helm/uninstall", s.handleHelmUninstall)
+	mux.HandleFunc("/helm/upgrade", s.handleHelmUpgrade)
+
 	// Rename context endpoint
 	mux.HandleFunc("/rename-context", s.handleRenameContextHTTP)
